E_{k + j + 1} = \left(\bar{A}\right)_{k + j} E_{k + j} + \left(\bar{B}\right)_{k + j} U_{k + j} + \left(\bar{G}\right)_{k + j} w_{k + j} , \\ & & H_{1} \left(E_{k + j} - E_{k + j + 1}\right) \leq \left(H - t_{min}\right) I_{N \times 1} , \\ & & H_{2} E_{k + j + 1} \leq L_{k + j + 1} , \\ & & U_{k + j} \leq U_{max} , \\ & & - U_{k + j} \leq - U_{min} , j = 0 , 1 , \ldots , M - 1 .\end{matrix}
